overview: AI Resume Screening Portal — a production-grade, next-generation SaaS application for intelligent resume analysis. Upload PDF resumes for advanced NLP-based skill extraction and scoring, match candidates to job descriptions, and manage candidates via a comprehensive admin portal. Features a dark AI-themed design with glass-morphism cards, circular score gauges, color-coded skill chips, sidebar navigation, and a professional hero landing page.
features: Hero landing page with animated stats and CTA buttons
Dark AI-themed gradient with glass-morphism cards
Circular score gauge with animated fill
Color-coded skill chips (Technical, Tools, Soft Skills)
Sidebar navigation for users and admins
Job matching with circular gauge visualization
Timeline-style upload history with score trend chart
Admin portal: KPI cards, candidate table with status badges, Charts
Math CAPTCHA registration and security question password recovery
Back arrow navigation on all post-login pages
